# OpenSIN-AI Documentation Master Index

> Canonical knowledge for Humans and AI Agents.

## Documentation Surfaces
- [Guide Index](https://docs.opensin.ai/guide/getting-started)
- [Developer SDK](https://docs.opensin.ai/sdk/overview)
- [A2A JSON-RPC Spec](https://docs.opensin.ai/api/a2a)
- [Fleet Governance](https://docs.opensin.ai/governance/overview)

## Security & Rules
- [Sovereign Security Mandate](https://docs.opensin.ai/governance/security-mandate)
- [Performance Standards](https://docs.opensin.ai/best-practices/performance)

## Repositories
- [OpenSIN Core](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN)
- [OpenSIN-Code CLI](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Code)
- [Fleet Templates](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Template-SIN-Agent)
